extended_help:
View your full Nova character stats or someone else's.

**Shows:**
- 💰 Economy: wallet, bank, items
- 📊 RPG: level, EXP, HP, stamina, attack
- ✨ Active buffs with timers
- 📅 Join date

Passive regen applies automatically when viewing your own profile.
author: Nova Chronicles — {{user}}
quote: *“Every step in Nova Tower writes destiny.”*
